seoTitle: Garland ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks, PDF & Important Dates
seoDescription: View the Garland ISD Calendar 2026-2027 with first day, holidays, breaks, early dismissal dates, printable PDF, and calendar download options for parents.
heroSummary: Garland ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 10, 2026 and ends on Thursday, May 27, 2027, with early release. Winter Break runs December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027, and Spring Break runs March 15-19, 2027.
calendarNotes: Garland ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 10, 2026 and lists May 27, 2027 as the last day of class with early dismissal. Fall Break runs October 12-16, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The calendar lists 82 days in the first semester and 93 days in the second semester. Families can use these dates to plan childcare, transportation, vacations, and school-year activities, then confirm campus-specific events with their assigned school.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Garland ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Thanksgiving Break 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD Thanksgiving Break runs Monday, November 23 through Friday, November 27, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How long is Garland ISD Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027, covering 12 calendar days and 10 weekdays without school.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Garland ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of class is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Garland ISD have early dismissal days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Garland ISD lists early dismissal on December 18, 2026 and May 27, 2027. Families should confirm dismissal times with the district or campus.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days does Garland ISD have in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD lists 175 instructional days for the 2026-2027 school year, with 82 days in the first semester and 93 days in the second semester.

calendarFaqs.q: Is the Garland ISD calendar the same for every school?
calendarFaqs.a: The district academic calendar applies to major school-year dates across Garland ISD, but campus-specific events, testing windows, athletics, performances, and ceremonies may vary by school.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Garland ISD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official Garland ISD school year calendar source linked on this page for the printable PDF. MySchoolDates also provides a searchable date table and a one-time calendar import file.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Garland ISD calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics file generated from the reviewed Garland ISD calendar records. It can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if Garland ISD revises the official calendar.

customSections.label: Garland ISD Calendar Highlights 2026-2027
customSections.content: The GISD academic calendar gives Garland ISD families a planning reference for the August 10 first day, the October 12-16 Fall Break, the March 15-19 Spring Break, and the May 27 last day with early dismissal. These dates affect childcare, transportation, school activities, shared custody schedules, and family travel planning across Garland, Rowlett, Sachse, and nearby Dallas County communities.

groups.label: Important planning dates
items: Last day of class with early dismissal: May 27, 2027.

groups.label: Why these dates matter
items: Fall Break and Spring Break each provide a full school week without classes, which makes them common windows for short trips and childcare planning.
Winter Break is the longest holiday period and overlaps with major year-end holidays.
Early dismissal dates may require afternoon pickup, transportation, or after-school care adjustments.

groups.label: What parents should know
items: Use the district calendar for attendance days, holidays, breaks, and early dismissal planning.
Use campus calendars for testing windows, athletics, performances, ceremonies, and school-specific deadlines.
Confirm schedule changes with Garland ISD before making plans that depend on a student holiday or early dismissal.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 Calendar Snapshot
customSections.content: This snapshot summarizes the Garland ISD school schedule for the 2026-2027 academic year in a quick planning format.

groups.label: Snapshot
items: Early Release Days: December 18, 2026 and May 27, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists 82 first-semester days and 93 second-semester days.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Garland ISD schedules a full week of Fall Break before a staff development/student holiday on October 19.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissal
yearNumbers.detail: Early dismissal is listed on December 18 and May 27.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 11 in 2025 to August 10 in 2026.
Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2026 to March 15-19 in 2027.
The last day moves from May 22 in 2026 to May 27 in 2027.
